UG-18  MATERIALS. (a) Materials used in pressure vessel construction shall conform to UG-80. Identification shall be in accordance with UG-81. Subject to the applicable material group, UCS-23 or UHA-23 shall govern stress values. (b) When applicable, materials shall be impact-tested per UG-84. For low-temperature service, see also UCS-66. Except as permitted by UCS-67, no MDMT reduction is allowed without testing. (c) The Manufacturer shall maintain test reports as required by UG-93.
